investigation_summary: Clean card: independent values board under Unilever sale (2000) protects social mission. B Corp; Fairtrade vanilla/cocoa/sugar; living-wage pioneer; Vermont manufacturing. Caveats: ultimate parent Unilever has its own ethics file; Israel settlements dispute tested independence; premium dairy & sugar.

profile.tax_summary: Operates inside Unilever tax/consolidation envelope — see Unilever profile for parent.
profile.legal_summary: Public advocacy stances (criminal justice, climate, etc.); litigation with Unilever re West Bank distribution per press.
profile.labor_summary: Living wage commitment including supply chain (per company claims).
profile.environmental_summary: Dairy footprint; climate activism; sourcing certifications.
profile.political_summary: Progressive brand voice — occasionally conflicts with parent.
profile.product_health: Ice cream — high sugar; premium indulgence category.
profile.executive_summary: Founders Cohen & Greenfield; Unilever ownership since 2000 with governance carve-out.
